metadata.description: A four-party collaboration protocol for running AI agents on real work: owner/builder/orchestrator role skills, an independent cross-vendor reviewer gating every round, and a human principal holding all authorization gates.

plugins.name: agent-protocol
plugins.description: Role skills for the multi-agent collaboration protocol: agent-core (shared normative references), owner-engine-agent, helper-builder-agent, orchestrator-agent, plus /sleep and /wake lifecycle commands
